_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: MC Server Notifier JS
author: noreply@rinlaboratory.io
description: Discord bot that monitors Minecraft servers, machines and HTTP endpoints. This egg runs the pre-built Docker image and keeps config.yaml/config.yml plus lang.yaml/lang.yml editable in /home/container.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -eu
cd /mnt/server

if [ ! -f config.yaml ] && [ ! -f config.yml ]; then
cat > config.yaml <<'CONFIG_YAML'
# MC Server Notifier configuration
# Replace these placeholder values before starting the server.

discordConfig:
  DISCORD_BOT_CLIENT_ID: '000000000000000000'
  DISCORD_BOT_GUILD_ID: '000000000000000000'
  DISCORD_BOT_CHANNEL_ID: '000000000000000000'
  DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN: ''
  mentionUsers:
    - '000000000000000000'

servers:
  - name: 'Local Machine'
    type: 'machine'
    config:
      serverIP: '127.0.0.1'
      serverPort: 1
      serverURL: 'https://your-server.example.com'
  - name: 'Minecraft Server'
    type: 'server'
    config:
      serverIP: '127.0.0.1'
      serverPort: 25565
      serverURL: 'https://your-server.example.com'
CONFIG_YAML
fi

if [ ! -f lang.yaml ] && [ ! -f lang.yml ]; then
cat > lang.yaml <<'LANG_YAML'
# MC Server Notifier language file

lang:
  commands:
    reload:
      reply: 'Configuracion recargada exitosamente'
      description: 'Recarga la configuracion'
    toggle-servers-urls:
      reply:
        shown: 'A partir de la proxima actualizacion se mostraran las URLs de los servidores'
        hidden: 'A partir de la proxima actualizacion se esconderan las URLs de los servidores'
      description: 'Esconde o muestra las URLs de los servidores'
      hidden: '(Oculto)'
    error: 'Ha ocurrido un error al ejecutar este comando'
  embed:
    title: 'Server Status'
    description: 'Servidores bajo observacion'
    footer: 'Ultima Actualizacion'
  server:
    first-column:
      top: '{{server_name}}'
      bottom: '{{server_status}}'
    middle-column:
      top: '{{server_runtime}}'
      bottom: '{{server_url}}'
    last-column:
      top: 'Ult. Aviso'
      bottom: '{{last_available}}'
    status:
      offline: 'Fuera de linea'
      online: 'En linea'
    last-fetch:
      never: 'Nunca'
  machine:
    cpu-usage: '{{machine_name}} USO DE CPU'
    ram-usage: '{{machine_name}} USO DE RAM'
    disk-usage: '{{machine_name}} USO DE DISCO'
  perms:
    missing-perms: 'No tienes permisos'
LANG_YAML
fi

echo 'MC Server Notifier templates are ready in /mnt/server.'
echo 'Edit config.yaml before starting the server.'
exit 0

variables.name: Node Environment
variables.description: Runtime mode for the bot. Keep this as production for Pterodactyl.

variables.name: Config Directory
variables.description: Directory where config.yml/config.yaml is mounted inside the container.

variables.name: Language Directory
variables.description: Directory where lang.yml/lang.yaml is mounted inside the container.
